0.0331*(sin(0.8389*x_1 - 0.9975) - 0.1842*sin(2.3106*x_2 - 7.6895) - 0.3725)**2 - 0.0026*(0.0509*sin(4.5595*x_1 + 9.0488) - sin(1.5563*x_2 - 7.9613) - 0.2208)**2 + 0.6079*exp(-0.1403*x_1 + 0.701*tanh(0.976*x_2 - 1.5421)) + 0.0062*sin(-3.2201*sin(0.8363*x_1 + 8.1861) + 1.0703*tanh(0.882*x_2 - 1.4785) + 10.5128) - 0.1475*sin(0.376*sin(2.339*x_1 + 5.4479) + 1.4447*sinh(0.6719 - 1.0185*x_2) - 2.479) - 0.8878

0.0011*(0.0509*sin(4.5595*x_1 + 9.0488) - sin(1.5563*x_2 - 7.9613) - 0.8103)**3 + 0.0977*exp(-2.1852*sin(0.8363*x_1 + 8.1861) + 0.7263*tanh(0.882*x_2 - 1.4785)) + 0.054*sin(1.0938*sin(0.8389*x_1 - 0.9975) - 0.2014*sin(2.3106*x_2 - 7.6895) + 0.6006) - 0.2043*sinh(0.4435*x_1 - 2.2155*tanh(0.976*x_2 - 1.5421) - 1.8381) - 0.0794*sinh(-0.2416*sin(2.339*x_1 + 5.4479) - 0.9283*sinh(0.6719 - 1.0185*x_2) + 0.0478) + 1.2316
